description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, streamlined design with a predominantly black and yellow color scheme. The body is angular and aerodynamic, with a low-profile seat and integrated fairings that cover much of the mechanical components. The wheels are solid and enclosed, with the rear wheel being larger and finished in yellow, while the front wheel is gray. The handlebars are minimalistic and blend into the upper bodywork, suggesting a sport or concept bike style. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and composite materials, with a matte and slightly worn finish. There are no visible brand markings or license plates, and the design emphasizes speed and modern aesthetics.
description: A sleek, futuristic black and yellow motorcycle with enclosed wheels and an aerodynamic, angular body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, solid front tire and the narrow, angular front fairing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, low seat, and the yellow rear wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large yellow rear tire and the tapered tail section.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible mechanical details and the black and yellow color split.
